scope: CRM contact email create/update duplicate races and opportunity duplicate id create race

behavior: Concurrent duplicate opportunity id POST requests return exactly one 201 and one 409 opportunity_id_taken, then read back exactly one opportunity row for the id.
Concurrent duplicate contact email POST requests return exactly one 201 and one 409 contact_email_taken, then read back exactly one contact row for the email.
Concurrent contact email PATCH requests to the same target email return exactly one 200 and one 409 contact_email_taken, then read back exactly one contact row with the target email.
Opportunity create now treats nested Postgres 23505 unique violations in error.cause as opportunity_id_taken instead of leaking an internal error.

tests: cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/crmRoutes.db.test.ts -t \"concurrent duplicate|conflict-safe\"" -> 1 file passed; 2 tests passed, 10 skipped
git diff --check on CRM files/report -> passed
green.warning: Existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts remains unrelated.

remainingRisk: This narrows CRM contact/opportunity duplicate race coverage only. It does not complete every CRM write flow or the full product write-flow idempotency matrix.
